title: Coronation Asset Management & Registrars Services: Driving Financial Excellence - FinancialEDGE
description: Aigbovbioise Aig-Imoukhuede, Managing Director of Coronation Asset Management, and Oluseyi Owoturo, Managing Director of Coronation Registrars Limited, shared valuable insights into their respective companies' services with Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director, Financial Edge during Coronation Group CEO's communications engagement in Lagos. html: Aigbovbioise Aig-Imoukhuede, Managing Director of Coronation Asset Management, and Oluseyi Owoturo, Managing Director of Coronation Registrars Limited, shared valuable insights into their respective companies’ services with Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director, Financial Edge during Coronation Group CEO’s communications engagement in Lagos.
